name: Enchilada Pie
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces lowfat cheddar cheese, shredded (you may also use Monterey Jack cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef, onion, and garlic in a frying pan until no longer pink.
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Mix in the seasonings (salt, pepper, chili powder) and tomato sauce.
4. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
5. Spread about 1 teaspoon of margarine on each tortilla.
6. In a medium oven-proof casserole dish, alternate layers with tortillas, meat mixture, olives, and cheese.
7. Pour the beef broth over the top of the layered casserole.
8. Cover and bake for 20 minutes in the preheated oven.
9. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
(Note: The nutritional information provided is based on the recipe as given.)
